content: The list of users previously invited to {{productName}} or separate rooms will appear here. You will be able to invite these users for collaboration at any time.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a message explaining that the list of previously invited users can be accessed and invited for collaboration in certain situations. It appears on an empty screen when no content is displayed, likely in a button or dialog context, such as in a settings or invitation section of the UI.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Bulgarian translation changes the meaning of the sentence. The English text says the list contains users invited to '{{productName}} OR separate rooms'. The Bulgarian translation says the list will contain 'either a list of users... OR separate rooms', which implies the list itself could be a room, which is logically incorrect.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Списъкът с потребители, поканени преди това в {{productName}} или в отделни стаи, ще се появи тук. Ще можете да поканите тези потребители за сътрудничество по всяко време.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'oa' is a typo/nonsense word in Italian; it should be 'o' (or).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Qui apparirà l’elenco degli utenti precedentemente invitati a {{productName}} o stanze separate. Potrai invitare questi utenti a collaborare in qualsiasi momento.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'පරිශ්‍රීලකයින්ගේ' (parishreelakayinge) is a misspelling of 'පරිශීලකයින්ගේ' (parishilakayinge). While it is a spelling error, in the context of UI strings, it can lead to a perceived lack of professionalism, though technically it is a typo of 'users'. More importantly, the word 'පරිශ්‍රීලකයින්' is not a standard Sinhala word for 'users'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{productName}} හෝ වෙනම කාමර වෙත කලින් ආරාධනා කර ඇති පරිශීලකයින්ගේ ලැයිස්තුව මෙහි දිස් වනු ඇත. ඔබට ඕනෑම විටෙක සහයෝගයෙන් වැඩ කිරීමට මෙම පරිශීලකයින්ට ආරාධනා කිරීමට හැකිය.
